subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P3] Run verification gate for Phase 3
description:
Run the full verification suite to confirm Phase 3 (file infrastructure) is complete and working.

## Commands

```bash
pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test -- --run
```

All three must pass.

## Manual verification

1. Start the dev server and confirm:
   - Default templates are seeded at `{dorkHome}/tasks/templates/` (4 `.md` files)
   - Global watcher is running (check logs for "Watching" message)
   - Creating a task via API writes a `.md` file to the expected directory
   - Editing the `.md` file on disk updates the task in the API response within seconds
   - Deleting the `.md` file pauses the task
   - `GET /api/tasks/templates` returns the 4 default templates
2. Test the round-trip:
   - `POST /api/tasks` -> check file exists on disk -> modify file -> `GET /api/tasks` shows update
3. Check that the reconciler is running (log output every 5 minutes or trigger manually)

## Acceptance Criteria
- `pnpm typecheck` passes
- `pnpm build` succeeds
- `pnpm test -- --run` passes
- File-first CRUD works end-to-end
- Watcher detects changes within seconds
- Templates are seeded correctly
